title: Run Claude Code using Ollama
description: "This tutorial shows how to run claude code using a local Ollama model."
html: Install Ollama: curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh Pull a model ollama pull llama3.2 Configure the ollama select model for claude ollama launch claude --model llama3.2 Set the env vars to connect Claude to Ollama: export ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN="ollama" export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="" export ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL="http://localhost:11434" Run claude claude --model llama3.2

title: Maestro Threat Modeling Nanoclaw
html: This article details the result of a threat modeling using maestro framework in Nanoclaw by Nvidia. https://kenhuangus.substack.com/p/maestro-threat-modeling-nemoclaw

title: The AI Security Institute
html: This site contains a lot of researches about IA Governance and how AI Agents have been used in the real world. https://www.aisi.gov.uk/

title: Learn from incidents
html: This blog shares real cases about incidents and what we can learn from them https://www.learnfromincidents.com/

title: Trivy and LiteLLM was compromised
html: The Trivy GH Action was compromised and it affected a lot of other open source tools, creating an impactful attack chain. Here is the Snyk Post: https://snyk.io/pt-BR/articles/poisoned-security-scanner-backdooring-litellm/
